시편 102:1.content: Hear my prayer, Yahweh! Let my cry come to you.

시편 102:2.content: Don’t hide your face from me in the day of my distress. Turn your ear to me. Answer me quickly in the day when I call.

시편 102:3.content: For my days consume away like smoke. My bones are burned as a torch.

시편 102:4.content: My heart is blighted like grass, and withered, for I forget to eat my bread.

시편 102:5.content: By reason of the voice of my groaning, my bones stick to my skin.

시편 102:6.content: I am like a pelican of the wilderness. I have become as an owl of the waste places.

시편 102:7.content: I watch, and have become like a sparrow that is alone on the housetop.

시편 102:8.content: My enemies reproach me all day. Those who are mad at me use my name as a curse.

시편 102:9.content: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mixed my drink with tears,

시편 102:10.content: because of your indignation and your wrath; for you have taken me up and thrown me away.

시편 102:11.content: My days are like a long shadow. I have withered like grass.

시편 102:12.content: But you, Yahweh, will remain forever; your renown endures to all generations.

시편 102:13.content: You will arise and have mercy on Zion; for it is time to have pity on her. Yes, the set time has come.

시편 102:14.content: For your servants take pleasure in her stones, and have pity on her dust.

시편 102:15.content: So the nations will fear Yahweh’s name, all the kings of the earth your glory.

시편 102:16.content: For Yahweh has built up Zion. He has appeared in his glory.

시편 102:17.content: He has responded to the prayer of the destitute, and has not despised their prayer.

시편 102:18.content: This will be written for the generation to come. A people which will be created will praise Yah.

시편 102:19.content: For he has looked down from the height of his sanctuary. From heaven, Yahweh saw the earth;

시편 102:20.content: to hear the groans of the prisoner; to free those who are condemned to death;

시편 102:21.content: that men may declare Yahweh’s name in Zion, and his praise in Jerusalem;

시편 102:22.content: when the peoples are gathered together, the kingdoms, to serve Yahweh.

시편 102:23.content: He weakened my strength along the course. He shortened my days.

시편 102:24.content: I said, “My God, don’t take me away in the middle of my days. Your years are throughout all generations.

시편 102:25.content: Of old, you laid the foundation of the earth. The heavens are the work of your hands.

시편 102:26.content: They will perish, but you will endure. Yes, all of them will wear out like a garment. You will change them like a cloak, and they will be changed.

시편 102:27.content: But you are the same. Your years will have no end.

시편 102:28.content: The children of your servants will continue. Their offspring will be established before you.”
